title: Auto Light Control Unit Input Inspection

crossRefs.label: Disconnect the auto light control unit 7P coupler.

blocks.text: Auto Light Control Unit Input Inspection
Check for blown relay box No. A14 (10A) and sub-fuse/relay box No. D1 (15A) fuses and connections before performing the inspection.

1. Disconnect the auto light control unit 7P coupler. 2. Perform input inspection, if all is normal and there is something wrong with the system, Replace the auto light control unit. inspection terminal Wiring color Measuring conditions result Inspection items in case of abnormality 4 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. 1 yellow 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground. 2 green Disconnect the auto A/C control unit (32P) coupler. There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the No.19 terminal of the auto A/C control unit (32P) coupler. Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition 3 green Disconnect the auto A/C control unit (32P) coupler. There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the No. 29 terminal of the auto A/C control unit (32P) coupler. Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition 5 red Fuse box Remove coupler R (28P) There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the No. 19 terminal of the fuse box coupler R (28P). Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition

refs.label: Disconnect the auto light control unit 7P coupler.
Replace the auto light control unit.

items.text: Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
